briefdescription.para: The authorization header key.
The client name to get it from IFlurlClientCache.
The default response awaiting timeout.
The default delay between retries.
The default http request executing policy.
The default request and response serializer.

memberdef.argsstring: (IFlurlClientCache clientCache, ILoggerFactory loggerFactory, Func< string > baseUrlResolver, Func< Task< string > >? tokenResolver=null)
memberdef.name: ClientBase

briefdescription.para: Initiates the new instance of ClientBase.

memberdef.argsstring: (Action< Url > url, IDictionary< string, object >? headers=null, CancellationToken token=default)

briefdescription.para: Sends GET request with awaiting serialized body response.

memberdef.name: ExecuteWithPolicyAsync

briefdescription.para: Executes the flurl request with Policy.

simplesect.para: The Task which result contains the new instance of IFlurlResponse.

memberdef.argsstring: (Func< IFlurlRequest, CancellationToken, Task< IFlurlResponse > > func, IFlurlRequest request, CancellationToken token=default)
memberdef.name: ExecuteWithoutPolicyAsync

briefdescription.para: Executes the request delegate without policy.

simplesect.para: The Task which result contains the new instance of IFlurlResponse.
